modules.name: Android Auto
modules.description: Enables Android Auto support on BYD Di3/Di4 head units. Installs patched AndroidAuto APK with certificate bypass.
modules.author: BYD Community
modules.changelog: Initial release — patched AndroidAuto with SSL bypass

modules.name: CarPlay + MFi Hook
modules.description: Enables Apple CarPlay by emulating the MFi coprocessor (CP02AH) via LD_PRELOAD hook. Requires a donor DI3 unit on the same Wi-Fi for MFi signing relay.
modules.author: BYD Community
modules.changelog: Initial release — MFi I2C hook + relay client

modules.name: Arabic UI Language Pack
modules.description: Patches 13 system APKs with Arabic translations (RTL support). Includes AutoVideo, BluetoothPhone, BydBootGuide, CarSetting, Launcher3 and more.
modules.author: BYD Community
modules.changelog: Initial release — Arabic translations for 13 system APKs

modules.name: iFlytek Global Voice Engine
modules.description: Replaces the China-only Cerence voice stack with the iFlytek global engine. Supports Arabic, English, Russian, Hindi and 7 more languages. Requires ~1.5 GB of voice data on /data/navi.
modules.author: BYD Community
modules.changelog: Initial release — patched SpeechHMI with autoType whitelist bypass + country code fix

modules.name: BYD App Store
modules.description: Installs the BydStore APK — a marketplace for additional BYD-specific applications.
modules.author: BYD Community

modules.name: Google Mobile Services (GMS)
modules.description: Installs Google Play Services and core GMS packages. Required for apps that depend on Google APIs.
modules.author: BYD Community

modules.name: Signature Spoofing
modules.description: Patches the Android framework to allow signature spoofing. Required by MicroG as a Google Play Services replacement.
modules.author: BYD Community

modules.name: OTA Update Bypass
modules.description: Redirects OTA update checks to a local mock server, preventing unwanted firmware updates that may undo modifications.
modules.author: BYD Community
modules.changelog: Initial release — blocks OTA via hosts redirect
